name: Olympic Seoul Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix vinegar, soy sauce, honey, and ginger together in a small bowl; set aside.
2. Heat the oil in a large fry pan over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook, turning occasionally, for about 10 minutes or until the chicken is brown on all sides.
3. Add garlic and red pepper; cook, stirring, for 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Add vinegar mixture; cover and cook for about 15 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender.
5. Uncover and cook for an additional 1 to 2 minutes or until the sauce is slightly thick. Serve with rice.
Cook: Muriel Brody, Rhode Island
Source: "Chicken Cookery" - 1994 Delmarva Chicken Cooking Contest
: Delmarva Poultry Industries, Inc.
: Georgetown, Delaware, 19947-9622
